goal: Add a tightly bounded local PR receipt JSON file loader that requires a ready BPK-038 decision and a successful BPK-042 request contract, enforces root/path/max-byte guards, parses JSON, imports through BPK-031, and performs no GitHub, PR, merge, workflow, package, or external-state action.
scope_out: Do not call GitHub, create PRs, merge, write files, change workflows, change package files, change deployment files, or read outside the explicitly allowed root/path/max-byte guard.
claims: Local PR receipt files can be read only inside the BPK-038 and BPK-042 guards.
Loaded JSON is imported through the existing BPK-031 artifact import path.
No GitHub, PR, merge, workflow, package, or external-state action is performed.
assumptions: The caller provides an explicit local root and operator-approved relative path.
dod: Successful load, oversize guard, and contract guard cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: GitHub calls, PR creation, merge, writes, workflow changes, package changes, deployment changes, or unguarded file reads become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-042 defined the loader request contract but intentionally performed no file read. BPK-046 may implement a bounded local JSON read under the BPK-038/BPK-042 gates.
